name: CashbackPro MCP Server
description: AliExpress cashback for AI assistants: search products, estimate cashback, and generate personal cashback links. Remote server (Streamable HTTP) at https://cashbackpro.org/api/mcp; works anonymously too (affiliate links, no cashback - disclosed to the user).

tools.name: calculate_cashback
tools.description: Estimate cashback for an amount by user level

tools.name: get_cashback_link
tools.description: Generate an affiliate link; with a connected account the purchase earns the user cashback
